title: Function parameters with default values should not be modified or assigned
description: Avoid modifying or assigning values to function parameters with default values, as it can lead to unintended consequences and make the code harder to understand.
message: Avoid modifying or assigning values to function parameters with default values.
recommendation: Refactor the function to remove the assignment to default parameters, or explicitly pass the value when calling the function.

noncompliant.description: Modifying a parameter with a default value.

compliant.description: Modifying a function local variable instead of a parameter with a default value.
Using a parameter with a default value correctly.

why_is_this_an_issue: Modifying or assigning values to function parameters with default values can lead to unintended consequences and make the code harder to understand.
how_to_fix: Refactor the function to remove the assignment to default parameters, or explicitly pass the value when calling the function.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if a property's value is either 'None' or 'assign' (a custom value indicating an assignment to the property).

metadata.title: Function parameters with default values should not be modified or assigned
